use_codes.desc: IMPROVEMENT IN GLYCEMIC CONTROL IN TYPE 2 DIABETES MELLITUS PATIENTS BY USE OF A PEN INJECTOR
COMBINATION TREATMENT WITH A GLITAZONE FOR IMPROVEMENT OF GLYCEMIC CONTROL IN TYPE 2 DIABETES MELLITUS PATIENTS
COMBINATION TREATMENT WITH INSULIN GLARGINE WITH OR WITHOUT METFORMIN FOR IMPROVEMENT OF GLYCEMIC CONTROL IN TYPE 2 DIABETES MELLITUS PATIENTS
